articles.author: Tim Vickery
articles.title: Messi's World Cup farewell comes full circle against Spain - ESPN
articles.description: Spain once wanted Lionel Messi over 20 years ago. Now, the reigning European champions must stop him in what could be his final World Cup game for Argentina.
articles.content: As this FIFA World Cup tournament keeps proving, it's always unwise to put limits on Lionel Messi. And so whether it's a possibility or a probability, there is a chance that the 39-year-old's interna… [+4596 chars]

articles.author: Dominic Preston
articles.title: OnePlus officially gives up on the US and Europe - The Verge
articles.description: OnePlus will no longer sell new hardware in the two markets, and existing devices will transition to Oppo’s ColorOS for future software updates.
articles.content: Existing OnePlus devices will transition to Oppos ColorOS for future software updates. Existing OnePlus devices will transition to Oppos ColorOS for future soft… [+3935 chars]
